zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Wogan於大約1375年出生在威爾士布洛可爾皮可頓時，他的父親David Wogan22歲，母親Anne Plunkett22歲。他於大約1390年與Ann verch Iarll Wermod在愛爾蘭結婚。他去世於1421年在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達拉可福享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Wogan于大约1375年出生在威尔士布洛可爾皮可頓时，他的父亲David Wogan22岁，母亲Anne Plunkett22岁。他于大约1390年与Ann verch Iarll Wermod在爱尔兰结婚。他去世于1421年在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達拉可福享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wogan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh, English, and Irish (Dublin): from the Old Welsh personal name Guoccaun, which derives from the ancestor of Modern Welsh gogawn ‘honour, glory’. In Middle Welsh it became Gwogon and Gwogan and was adopted as a surname by a south Pembrokeshire Anglo-Norman family in the normanized or Anglicized pronunciation Wogan. Compare Cadogan . In Ireland the name has been Gaelicized as Úgán.
History: A family of this name settled in County Kildare following the Anglo-Norman invasion of the 12th century.

variants.name: Ogan
meanings: Irish: of Welsh origin, a variant of Wogan , found Gaelicized as Úgán.

variants.name: Vogan
meanings: Irish: of Welsh origin, a variant of   Wogan  .

variants.name: Cadogan
meanings: Welsh (Pembrokeshire and Glamorgan) and Irish (of Welsh origin): from the Old Welsh personal name Catgucaun, Catguocawn, modernized as Cadwgon. It is composed of cad ‘battle’ + gogawn ‘honour, glory’. See also Wogan . The surname is stressed, like its Welsh original, on the penultimate syllable, hence its occasional development to Duggan .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Wogan was born about 1375, in Picton, Pembrokeshire, Wales, his father, David Wogan, was 22 and his mother, Anne Plunkett, was 22. He married Ann verch Iarll Wermod about 1390, in Ireland. He died in 1421, in Rathcoffey, County Kildare, Ireland, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Wogan est né environ 1375, à Picton, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, David Wogan, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Anne Plunkett, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Ann verch Iarll Wermod environ 1390, à Irlande. Il est décédé en 1421, à Rathcoffey, County Kildare, Irlande, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Wogan um 1375 in Picton, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater David Wogan 22 und seine Mutter Anne Plunkett 22. Er hat um 1390 in Irland Ann verch Iarll Wermod geheiratet. Er starb 1421 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Rathcoffey, County Kildare, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wogan è nato il circa 1375 nel Picton, Pembrokeshire, Galles, il suo padre, David Wogan, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Anne Plunkett, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Ann verch Iarll Wermod circa 1390, nel Irlanda. Morì nel 1421, nel Rathcoffey, County Kildare, Irlanda, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Woganが約1375年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアピクトンで生まれた時，父David Woganは22歳，母Anne Plunkettは22歳であった。約1390年にアイルランドでAnn verch Iarll Wermodと結婚した。彼は1421年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアラスコフエイで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Wogan(이)가 대략 1375년 웨일스 p브로케실르 피크턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David Wogan(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Plunkett(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1390년 아일랜드에서 Ann verch Iarll Wermod(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1421년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 래스코피에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wogan nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Picton, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, David Wogan, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Anne Plunkett, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann verch Iarll Wermod aproximadamente 1390, em Irlanda. Ele faleceu em 1421, em Rathcoffey, County Kildare, Irlanda, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Wogan родился около 1375 г. в местности пиктон, пемброкешир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени David Wogan было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Plunkett, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann verch Iarll Wermod около 1390 г. в местности Ирландия. Он умер в 1421 г. в местности раткоффи, коунти каилдар, Ирландия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Wogan nació aproximadamente 1375, en Picton, Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, David Wogan, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Anne Plunkett, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Ann verch Iarll Wermod aproximadamente 1390, en Irlanda. Murió en 1421, en Rathcoffey, County Kildare, Irlanda, a la edad de 47 años.
